## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss efficiency improvements and project updates for GrowthX's content creation processes.](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing its own "scrunch" dashboard; teams should slow-roll client requests for access](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Efficiency in serving clients is a top priority; hiring for MEs and CMs is ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Matthew's team is 2-3 weeks ahead on deliverables for Biologica and Monograph, offering insights into productivity gains](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Claude Enterprise and custom prompts are being leveraged to enhance content refinement and editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Topics

### Project Buffer and Client Management

  - [Matthew's team is 2-3 weeks ahead on deliverables for Biologica and Monograph](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Buffer creates positive pressure on clients, allowing for smoother workflow](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Biologica has no publishing requirements yet, simplifying the process](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Monograph's reviewer was on vacation, but content delivery remained on track](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Efficiency Improvements and Bottlenecks

  - [Leadership is focused on improving efficiency in serving clients](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Weekly reports on time spent per client are being considered](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Potential specialization of roles (e.g., dedicated CM for internal linking) is under discussion](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Matthew's success in getting ahead on publishing is seen as a model to replicate](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Content Creation Tools and Processes

  - [Claude Enterprise is being used extensively for content refinement](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Custom prompt libraries and projects in Claude are saving significant time](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [The team is waiting for new "agentic" pipelines before investing in fixing old ones](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Ask.ai editor with sidebar and context calling is showing improvements](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

### Upcoming Changes and Recommendations

  - [GrowthX is building its own "scrunch" dashboard; teams should be cautious about sharing access](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [All team members should upgrade to Claude Enterprise for improved functionality](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [A presentation on refinement prompts and editing techniques is planned for the next all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [The team should balance using Claude projects with continuing to use Atlas as the primary tool](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to create a genericized version of useful prompts for the team](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Andi to coordinate with Mara about upgrading Cloud access for all team members](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [Plan a presentation for the all-hands meeting on refinement prompts and editing techniques](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and providing feedback on the Ask.ai editor improvements](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Team members to upgrade their Claude access to Enterprise if not already done](https://fathom.video/share/gRMx5SDVj2MzJTJTyQuCDcBLJs35fD9C?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
